reviews.author: Neha
reviews.body: Beautiful Iconography & Symbolism.The Nandi figure is crafted with care and reverence.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
🪔 Pyrite Nandi Diwali Combo – Abundance, Protection & Divine Blessings

Celebrate this Diwali with a powerful blend of divine energy and prosperity. The Pyrite Nandi Combo includes:✨ Two Crystal Tealight Candles – symbolizing light, clarity, and new beginnings.✨ Pyrite Nandi Ji – a sacred emblem of strength, devotion, and abundance.

Pyrite, also known as Fool’s Gold, is believed to attract wealth, positivity, and protection, while Nandi Ji represents devotion, patience, and faith. Together, this combo makes a perfect spiritual gift and festive essential, radiating both light and energy into your home.

*Free wax candles with every order!

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Attracts wealth & prosperity – Pyrite is known as the stone of abundance.

Sacred protection & devotion – Nandi Ji blesses your home with patience, strength, and divine grace.

Festive aura – The crystal candles fill your space with warmth and positive vibrations.

Perfect gifting choice – Ideal for Diwali, housewarmings, or spiritual offerings.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Place the Pyrite Nandi Ji in your puja room, living room, or office desk to invite blessings.

Light the crystal candles during Diwali rituals, meditation, or to uplift your home’s energy.

Can be gifted as a meaningful token of love, light, and prosperity.
